SEARCH
Package project2_root.database

Class SQLServerPOSDatabase

java.lang.Object
project2_root.database.SQLServerPOSDatabase
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, POSDatabase
public class SQLServerPOSDatabase extends Object implements POSDatabase, AutoCloseable
JDBC-backed POSDatabase implementation used by the JavaFX POS app. Wraps SQL queries, simple transaction boundaries, and report aggregation helpers.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructor
    Description

    Creates a new order shell for the given employee.

    Returns all employees currently stored in the employee table.

    Returns ingredient stock levels for manager inventory views.

    Returns ingredient usage totals between two dates.

    Loads a menu item's basic fields by id.

    Returns all menu items currently available in the item table.

    Returns the number of orders placed since the last generated Z-report.

    getOrderItems(int orderId)
    Returns all persisted line items for a given order.

    Returns all restock orders currently stored in the database.

    Returns sales totals between two dates using either weekly or monthly buckets.

    Removes a line item and subtracts its cost from the parent order total.

    • SQLServerPOSDatabase

      public SQLServerPOSDatabase()

  • Method Details

    • connect

      public void connect(String url, String user, String password)
      Opens the JDBC connection used by this database adapter.
      Parameters:
      url - the JDBC connection URL
      user - the database username
      password - the database password

    • close

      public void close()
      Closes the active JDBC connection.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable

    • validateLogin

      public Optional<Employee> validateLogin(int employeeId, String password)
      Validates login credentials against the employee table.
      Specified by:
      validateLogin in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the employee id to authenticate
      password - the password to verify
      Returns:
      the matching employee when authentication succeeds, or empty otherwise

    • getMenuItems

      public Collection<MenuItem> getMenuItems()
      Returns all menu items currently available in the item table.
      Specified by:
      getMenuItems in interface POSDatabase
      Returns:
      menu items ordered by name

    • createOrder

      public int createOrder(int employeeId)
      Creates a new order shell for the given employee.
      Specified by:
      createOrder in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the employee creating the order
      Returns:
      the new order id, or -1 when creation fails

    • addItemToOrder

      public void addItemToOrder(int orderId, OrderItem item)
      Adds one line item to an order and updates the order total.
      Specified by:
      addItemToOrder in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      orderId - the order receiving the item
      item - the line item to persist

    • getRestockOrders

      public Collection<RestockOrder> getRestockOrders()
      Returns all restock orders currently stored in the database.
      Specified by:
      getRestockOrders in interface POSDatabase
      Returns:
      restock orders ordered by most recent first

    • getCriticalIngredients

      public Collection<Ingredient> getCriticalIngredients(int weeksToCover)
      Returns ingredients that fall below the projected coverage threshold.
      Specified by:
      getCriticalIngredients in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      weeksToCover - the number of weeks of projected usage to cover
      Returns:
      critical ingredients ordered by current stock ascending

    • getAllIngredients

      public Collection<Ingredient> getAllIngredients()
      Returns all ingredients currently stored in the ingredient table.
      Specified by:
      getAllIngredients in interface POSDatabase
      Returns:
      all ingredients ordered by name

    • submitRestockOrder

      public void submitRestockOrder(Map<Integer,Integer> ingredientQuantities)
      Creates a new restock order with one row per requested ingredient.
      Specified by:
      submitRestockOrder in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      ingredientQuantities - ingredient ids mapped to requested quantities

    • confirmOrder

      public void confirmOrder(int orderId)
      Confirms a restock order and applies its quantities to ingredient stock.
      Specified by:
      confirmOrder in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      orderId - the restock order to confirm

    • saveMenuItem

      public void saveMenuItem(int id, String name, double cost, Map<Integer,Integer> ingredients)
      Updates a menu item and replaces its ingredient recipe.
      Specified by:
      saveMenuItem in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      id - the menu item id
      name - the updated item name
      cost - the updated base price
      ingredients - ingredient ids mapped to required quantities

    • addMenuItem

      public void addMenuItem(String name, double cost, Map<Integer,Integer> ingredients)
      Inserts a new menu item and its ingredient recipe.
      Specified by:
      addMenuItem in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      name - the new item name
      cost - the new item base price
      ingredients - ingredient ids mapped to required quantities

      public Collection<Employee> getEmployees()
      Returns all employees currently stored in the employee table.
      Specified by:
      getEmployees in interface POSDatabase
      Returns:
      employee records ordered by last name

      public void saveEmployee(int employeeId, String firstName, String lastName, boolean isManager)
      Updates an employee's basic profile and manager flag.
      Specified by:
      saveEmployee in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      employeeId - the employee id to update
      firstName - the updated first name
      lastName - the updated last name
      isManager - the updated manager flag

      public Collection<OrderItem> getOrderItems(int orderId)
      Returns all persisted line items for a given order.

      Parameters:
      orderId - the order whose items should be loaded
      Returns:
      order line items for the requested order

      public void removeOrderItem(int orderItemId)
      Removes a line item and subtracts its cost from the parent order total.
      Specified by:
      removeOrderItem in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      orderItemId - the line-item id to remove

    • completeOrder

      public void completeOrder(int orderId)
      Completes an order. This implementation is a no-op because completion state is not persisted.
      Specified by:
      completeOrder in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      orderId - the completed order id

    • getIngredientStock

      public List<IngredientStock> getIngredientStock()
      Returns ingredient stock levels for manager inventory views.
      Specified by:
      getIngredientStock in interface POSDatabase
      Returns:
      ingredient stock rows ordered by servings available

    • addEmployee

      public void addEmployee(String firstName, String lastName, boolean isManager)
      Inserts a new employee record.
      Specified by:
      addEmployee in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      firstName - the employee first name
      lastName - the employee last name
      isManager - whether the employee is a manager

    • getSalesBetween

      public List<TimeBucketSales> getSalesBetween(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate, boolean weekly)
      Returns sales totals between two dates using either weekly or monthly buckets.
      Specified by:
      getSalesBetween in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      startDate - the inclusive start date
      endDate - the inclusive end date
      weekly - whether to use weekly rather than monthly aggregation
      Returns:
      aggregated sales buckets for the requested range

    • getSalesByItemBetween

      public List<ItemSalesRow> getSalesByItemBetween(LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
      Returns item-level sales totals between two dates.
      Specified by:
      getSalesByItemBetween in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      startDate - the inclusive start date
      endDate - the inclusive end date
      Returns:
      item sales rows ordered by revenue descending

    • addIngredient

      public int addIngredient(String name, double addCost)
      Inserts a new ingredient and returns its generated id.
      Specified by:
      addIngredient in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      name - the ingredient name
      addCost - the ingredient add-on cost
      Returns:
      the new ingredient id, or -1 when insertion fails

    • getMenuItemById

      public MenuItem getMenuItemById(int itemId)
      Loads a menu item's basic fields by id.
      Specified by:
      getMenuItemById in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      itemId - the menu item id to load
      Returns:
      the menu item, or null when not found

      public void decrementIngredientsForItem(OrderItem item)
      Decrements ingredient stock according to the recipe and quantity of a completed order item.
      Specified by:
      decrementIngredientsForItem in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      item - the completed order item whose ingredients should be decremented

    • getOrderCountToday

      public int getOrderCountToday()
      Returns the number of orders placed since the last generated Z-report.
      Specified by:
      getOrderCountToday in interface POSDatabase
      Returns:
      the current order count for the active business day

      public double getTotalSalesToday()
      Returns total sales since the last generated Z-report.
      Specified by:
      getTotalSalesToday in interface POSDatabase
      Returns:
      the current sales total for the active business day

      public List<HourlySalesRow> getHourlySalesToday()
      Returns hourly sales buckets since the last generated Z-report.
      Specified by:
      getHourlySalesToday in interface POSDatabase
      Returns:
      hourly sales rows for the active business day

    • getSalesByItemToday

      public List<ItemSalesRow> getSalesByItemToday()
      Returns item-level sales totals since the last generated Z-report.
      Specified by:
      getSalesByItemToday in interface POSDatabase
      Returns:
      item sales rows for the active business day, ordered by revenue

    • canGenerateZReport

      public boolean canGenerateZReport()
      Returns whether today's Z-report can still be generated.
      Specified by:
      canGenerateZReport in interface POSDatabase
      Returns:
      true when no Z-report has been recorded for the current date

    • finalizeCurrentZReport

      public ZReportSummary finalizeCurrentZReport()
      Persists the current day's Z-report summary and returns the generated record.
      Specified by:
      finalizeCurrentZReport in interface POSDatabase
      Returns:
      the stored Z-report summary, or a fallback summary when insertion fails

    • getZReportHistory

      public List<ZReportSummary> getZReportHistory()
      Returns historical Z-reports in reverse chronological order.
      Specified by:
      getZReportHistory in interface POSDatabase
      Returns:
      previously generated Z-report summaries

    • getIngredientUsage

      public Collection<IngredientUsageRow> getIngredientUsage(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)
      Returns ingredient usage totals between two dates.
      Specified by:
      getIngredientUsage in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      start - the inclusive start date
      end - the inclusive end date
      Returns:
      ingredient usage rows ordered by servings used descending

    • getIngredientsForMenuItem

      public List<ItemIngredient> getIngredientsForMenuItem(int itemId)
      Returns recipe rows for a specific menu item.
      Specified by:
      getIngredientsForMenuItem in interface POSDatabase
      Parameters:
      itemId - the menu item whose ingredients should be loaded
      Returns:
      ingredient rows for the requested menu item
